name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.12.0: Programmatic Track Changes generation (closes #45) — 3 new tools (insert_text_as_revision / delete_text_as_revision / move_text_as_revision) + 2 extended args (format_text / set_paragraph_format gain as_revision: bool). Closes Office.js OOXML Roadmap P0 set (100%). Built on ooxml-swift v0.18.0. v3.11.0: Tables / Hyperlinks / Headers extensions (#49 #50 #51). v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections foundation (#46 #47 #48). v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44).
